highlights.title: Image Generation Adapters
highlights.description: HTTP adapters for Together AI (FLUX), HuggingFace (SDXL), OpenAI (DALL-E), and Replicate with auto-registration from env vars and provider:model_id routing.

highlights.title: ContentGenerationService
highlights.description: Orchestration layer for pipeline-driven LLM text generation: resolve prompt template, fetch RAG source messages, call provider, and persist results.

highlights.title: Auto-Publish Mode
highlights.description: Pipelines can now auto-publish generated content to target channels without manual moderation approval.

highlights.title: PublishService
highlights.description: Transport layer to send text and media to Telegram target channels via the client pool.

highlights.title: Moderation Queue UI
highlights.description: Web UI for reviewing, editing, approving and rejecting generated drafts before publishing.

highlights.title: DeepAgents Backend
highlights.description: Researcher-writer agent backend for content generation using multi-step reasoning pipeline.

highlights.title: CLI Pipeline Commands
highlights.description: Full CLI coverage for pipeline operations: generate, publish, queue management.

highlights.title: Scheduler Cache
highlights.description: Cache scheduler jobs list with 5s TTL to eliminate N+1 queries in page context.
